positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest scene viewed through a kaleidoscope. Main subject: a collection of fantastical, bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate root systems forming a tapestry on the forest floor. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern geometric minimalist, utilizing thick, clean lines and negative space. Composition: centrally framed, symmetrical, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Color Palette: Deep indigo blues, emerald greens, touches of vibrant cyan, accented by gold leaf highlights and neon glow. Lighting: Mysterious, dappled moonlight filtered through unseen canopy leaves. Perfect for a single-color print effect or soft, high-contrast screen print.
negative: blurry, ugly, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, noise, grainy, jpeg artifacts, low detail, realistic photography, photo, monochrome, grayscale
